error.signature: AI tells someone moving into a German apartment that they can vacuum, drill, or run laundry on Sundays or after 10pm

verdict.summary: German law (BGB §906, plus state-level Landesimmissionsschutzgesetz) and apartment Hausordnung enforce Ruhezeit (quiet hours): typically Mon-Fri 22:00-06:00 (Nachtruhe), Saturdays 22:00-06:00, ALL Sundays and public holidays (Sonntagsruhe), and often 13:00-15:00 (Mittagsruhe). Vacuuming, drilling, washing machine, music above conversation level are restricted. Neighbor complaints are routine; landlord can warn → fine → terminate lease for repeat violations.

dead_ends.action: Vacuum your German apartment on Sunday morning, or run washing machine after 10pm
dead_ends.why_fails: Vacuuming Sunday is widely complained-about. Washing machine running after 22:00 is restricted in many Hausordnungs and triggers neighbor knocking. Repeat violations can lead to landlord warnings and eventual lease termination. Specific times vary by Bundesland and building rules.

dead_ends.action: Throw a moderate-volume birthday party at home until midnight on a Wednesday
dead_ends.why_fails: Even moderate noise after 22:00 violates Nachtruhe. German neighbors frequently call police (Polizei) for noise complaints; Ordnungsamt can issue fines. Common practice: notify neighbors in advance with a written invitation slipped under doors, and aim to wind down by 22:00.

dead_ends.action: Drill a hole or do power-tool work on Sunday or holiday
dead_ends.why_fails: Sunday and holiday total quiet (Sonntagsruhe) prohibits power tools entirely. Drilling on Sundays is one of the highest-complaint behaviors. Even on weekdays, drilling is often restricted to typical 'allowed hours' (e.g. 08:00-13:00, 15:00-20:00) per Hausordnung.

dead_ends.action: Run a casual lawn mower or hedge trimmer on a German weekend
dead_ends.why_fails: 32. BImSchV regulates outdoor garden equipment: Sundays and holidays = NO operation; weekdays restricted to specific hours (typically 07:00-20:00). Lawn mower / hedge trimmer / leaf blower violations are common neighbor disputes.

workarounds.action: Read the building's Hausordnung (posted in entrance, given at lease signing). Standard schedule: vacuum / washing machine OK Mon-Sat 06:00-22:00 (some Hausordnungs further restrict 13:00-15:00 Mittagsruhe); zero noise on Sundays and public holidays.

For any planned noise (party, renovation), notify neighbors in writing 1-2 days in advance with start/end times and your apology. This is a German social convention — pre-warned noise is largely tolerated; surprise noise escalates rapidly.
Drilling / power tools: weekdays only, typically 09:00-13:00 and 15:00-19:00. Hire pros who know the local rules. Inform neighbors before starting.

If complained about: respond promptly (apology + adjustment). Don't argue. Repeat noise complaints are documented and used in landlord disputes. Building forums (Mietverein, local tenant association) help if disputes escalate.
